panel.sectionTitle: Tools (verified Ask operations for this data)
panel.intro: Add typed, deterministic <1>read-only SPARQL tools</1> to this dataset. A saved tool is immediately used as a <3>verified tool for Ask</3> (saving is the human sign-off).
panel.emptyList: No tools yet. Create one from "Draft with AI" below.

author.subhead: Draft with AI (build one from what you want)
author.hint: Describe what you want and <1>the AI drafts a read-only search tool (SPARQL)</1> grounded in this data's words. The draft is <3>editable in place</3> and is <5>only finalized once you save</5> (saving is the human vetting gate). It uses the model selected in Settings.
author.intentPlaceholder: e.g. given a composition, return the crystal structure (space group, crystal system)
author.dirtyConfirm: You have unsaved edits in the draft. Discard them and continue?

notice.saved: Saved "{{name}}". It is now usable as a verified Ask tool.

panel.deleteConfirm:
Delete the tool "{{name}}"?
It will be removed from this dataset's Ask.

gate.ok: ✓ AI draft: validation OK (you can save as-is)
gate.bad: Needs fixing: {{error}} (edit and fix, then save)
gate.note: The server validates on save (read-only SELECT/ASK, safe binding).

result.head: Output mapping (optional, column name → SPARQL variable)
result.empty: If unspecified, the variable name is used as the column name.

runner.hint: Run a verified tool <1>with no key and no LLM</1> (typed, deterministic, with citations).
runner.cellCopyTip: · Click a cell to copy its full value (e.g. paste <0>sentence_iri</0> into <1>quote_with_citation</1>).
runner.cellCopyTitle: Click to copy the full value
